name: Apple Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
Mix the ingredients together in the order given. Sterilize 7 to 9 wide-mouth pint jars and lids by greasing them with shortening. Fill the jars half full, then bake on the middle rack of the oven at 325°F for 45 minutes. As soon as the cake is done, remove the jars from the oven one at a time. Wipe the rim of the jar clean with a cloth and place the hot sterilized lids on. Screw down the bands and let cool completely. Important - Do not use small mouth jars. Do not add any other ingredients. As the cake cools in the sealed jar, it will pull away from the side of the jar and come out easily when ready to serve.
Slice and serve with Lemon Sauce: In a pan, thoroughly stir together the cornstarch, sugar, and salt. Gradually stir in the boiling water, stirring constantly to keep it smooth. Continue stirring and cook over moderate heat until boiling. Boil gently for about 20 minutes. Remove from heat, add butter, lemon rind, and juice. Stir thoroughly. Serve hot over apple cake. Makes 1-1/4 cups. This sauce is thicker and more tart than the usual lemon sauce.
